_note: Empty playbook — all values are discovered through research and experimentation. Nothing is pre-seeded. Every field starts empty and gets populated as the agent runs cycles, pulls analytics, and identifies what works.
_hashtagNote: Agent discovers hashtag clusters through niche research (browsing + web search). No pre-seeded clusters. Populate after first research cycle.
_postingNote: Default posting times live in config.json. This section tracks experimented times and winning time once discovered.

formatMix._note: No format assumed at start. Populated after first scored entry exists. Updated every cycle from results.jsonl.

_ctaNote: Agent discovers effective CTAs through experimentation. May start with app's natural CTA from config.json brand voice, then iterate.
_topicNote: Agent discovers topics through niche research (browsing + web search). Do not pre-seed this list — let experiments drive it.
